name: game-screen-foundry
description: Spec-driven local workbench for generating and assembling game screen assets.

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run validate && npm test
scripts.release:check: npm run check && node scripts/check-local-paths.js && node scripts/check-tracked-imagegen.js
scripts.validate: node scripts/check-json.js && node scripts/check-skills.js && node scripts/validate-project-files.js
